note: BRAIN layer — signal assignments for enrichment waterfall. HANDS layer reads this to drive website crawl + email-find priority.

leads.signal_text: No website found on Google Maps listing — missing out on customers searching 'plumber Harrogate'
leads.pain_point: No website found — missing out on online customers
leads.notes: Good rating, active business — easy win. Find email via phone lookup or Companies House.

leads.signal_text: Website loads over HTTP (no padlock) and fails mobile test — Google actively penalises this in local rankings
leads.pain_point: Website lacks SSL certificate — browsers show 'Not Secure' warning
leads.notes: High-value lead. Owner name known. Double pain point (SSL + mobile) = strong PAS hook.

leads.signal_text: Website not mobile-friendly — 63% of local searches are on mobile. Also only 14 reviews at 3.2 stars.
leads.pain_point: Website not mobile-friendly — losing mobile visitors
leads.notes: Mid-tier. Low reviews = credibility issue. BAB framework — 'before: losing mobile visitors, after: ranking locally'.

leads.signal_text: No social media presence despite excellent 4.8★ rating with 142 reviews — not amplifying word-of-mouth
leads.notes: High-score lead. Owner name known. Strong social proof angle — help them amplify existing reputation.

leads.signal_text: Active on Instagram but no website — no way to take online bookings or rank in Google
leads.pain_point: No website found — missing out on online customers
leads.notes: Has social but no website. Good angle: 'Instagram brings awareness, website converts it to bookings'.

leads.signal_text: Site loads over HTTP — Chrome labels it 'Not Secure' which kills trust for a trades business asking customers to contact them
leads.pain_point: Website lacks SSL certificate — browsers show 'Not Secure' warning
leads.notes: Owner name known. Trust angle is strong for trades — customers Google you before calling.

leads.signal_text: Strong online presence — enrich further to find a specific pain point before emailing
leads.pain_point: Website could be improved to attract more local customers
leads.notes: Near-perfect profile. Deprioritise until a specific angle found (booking system? loading speed?).

leads.signal_text: HTTP site, not mobile-optimised, only 8 reviews at 3.1★ — triple weakness competing in a high-trust category
leads.pain_point: Website lacks SSL certificate — browsers show 'Not Secure' warning
leads.notes: Multiple problems. Keep email focused on one (SSL/trust). Don't list everything — overwhelm kills response.
